questionHtml:
Which statement concerning bond breaking is correct?

A.  Requires energy and is endothermic.

B.  Requires energy and is exothermic.

C.  Releases energy and is endothermic.

D.  Releases energy and is exothermic.

meta.title: Which statement concerning bond breaking is correct? A. Requires energy and is endothermic. B. Requires energy and is exothermic. C. Releases energy and is endothermic. D. Releases
